txt_en: The end of every winter is the blooming of spring flowers and the warmth of spring.
txt_cn: 每个冬天的句点都是春暖花开。

txt_en: Even a proverb is no proverb to you till your life has illustrated it.
txt_cn: 即便是格言，也是在你用人生将其诠释之后，才是真实的。

txt_en: Under the first full moon of the year, hearts find their way home.
txt_cn: 岁首满月下，心自有归途。

txt_en: When you have nothing to lose, it's time to gain.
txt_cn: 当你无可失去，便是收获之时。

txt_en: Take nothing on its looks; take everything on evidence.
txt_cn: 切勿以貌取人，凡事当以证据为凭。
